subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Lord! Aid this distinguished servant of Thine and make him a light in the garden of divine excellences, and a radiance to the eyes of those endowed with heavenly bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب رب اید عبدک الفاضل و اجعله نور حدیقه الفضائل و نور حدقه اعین الفواضل و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for teaching
